home.description: A space for thoughts and records
home.intro:
Created this blog to write anything I want.
I'm interested in web technologies and user experience.
Gonna write about anything from daily life to developer's thoughts.

about.title: About
about.intro:
I am a software engineer who values positivity, efficiency, and honesty.
This is a space where I refactor the tangled thoughts in my head into clean text.
While this blog serves more as a personal record than a content for others, it is always open.

Feel free to look around, just like browsing through my source code.

feed.title: Wan Sim
feed.description: A space for thoughts and records

intro.line1: Welcome! This is my digital garden.
intro.line2: This garden uses the PARA (Projects, Areas, Resources, Archives) structure to organize and share my thoughts and knowledge.
intro.line3: Use the sidebar to explore notes by each category.

projects.label: Projects
projects.description: Active efforts with clear goals and deadlines.

areas.label: Areas
areas.description: Ongoing responsibilities that require continuous care.

resources.label: Resources
resources.description: Topics and references that may be useful later.

archives.label: Archives
archives.description: Items from the other categories that are completed or inactive.
